competency_domain: Evaluating data information and digital content
question: Have you ever checked if the information you found online was true?
Have you ever searched for information on the internet (e.g. Google, YouTube)?
Have you ever used a mobile phone or the internet to check the news?
Have you ever used a mobile phone to get health information, for example, on Google, YouTube? For example, what to do when someone is sick, or what foods are healthy to eat?
Have you ever shared a document, picture, or video through an email?
Have you ever shared a document, picture, or video through a text message or WhatsApp?
Have you ever made a call on WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, or any other such apps?
Have you ever used social media, such as Facebook or Instagram, on a mobile phone, tablet or computer?
Have you ever moved files or folders on a mobile phone, tablet or computer?
Have you ever used copy and paste on a mobile phone, tablet or computer?
Have you ever edited a photo or video on a mobile phone, tablet or computer? For example, making it smaller/shorter, writing on it, or adding a filter?
Have you ever created or edited a PowerPoint presentation on a mobile phone, tablet or computer?
